mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memberStatus(num, member_id, status_code, memo, register_id, reg_date) VALUES (memberStatus_seq.NEXTVAL, #{member_id}, #{status_code}, #{memo}, #{register_id}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE member2 SET profile_photo = '' WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
UPDATE member SET last_login = SYSDATE, failure_cnt = 0 WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
UPDATE member SET last_login = SYSDATE, failure_cnt = 0 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.password, m1.enabled, m1.created_at, m1.update_at, m1.last_login, m3.authority, COALESCE(g.name, h.name, a.name) as name, COALESCE(g.email, h.email) as email, COALESCE(g.phone, h.phone) as tel, NULL as sns_provider, NULL as sns_id, NULL as birth, NULL as profile_photo, NULL as zip, NULL as addr1, NULL as addr2, NULL as receive_email FROM member m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m1.member_id = g.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN host_detail h ON m1.member_id = h.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN admin_detail a ON m1.member_id = a.member_id WHERE m1.member_id = #{member_id}

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.password, m1.enabled, m1.created_at, m1.update_at, m1.last_login, m3.authority, COALESCE(g.name, h.name, a.name) as name, g.nickname, g.grade, g.point, COALESCE(g.email, h.email) as email, COALESCE(g.phone, h.phone) as tel, NULL as sns_provider, NULL as sns_id, COALESCE(g.profile_image_url, h.profile_image_url) as profile_photo FROM member m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN guest_detail g ON m1.member_id = g.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN host_detail h ON m1.member_id = h.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN admin_detail a ON m1.member_id = a.member_id WHERE m1.login_id = #{login_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET failure_cnt = 0 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
UPDATE member SET failure_cnt = failure_cnt + 1 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
